identity.styleSentence: A driving D major dance-pop track at 129 bpm featuring a rolling bassline, punchy drums, and an anthemic vocal delivery that builds from intimate verses to a massive, euphoric chorus.
identity.summary: This driving D major dance-pop anthem explores music as a powerful life-saving substance that transforms pain into euphoria and unites strangers into one soul through rhythm.

keywords.imageryPrompt: A glowing neon pill dissolving into a river of golden light that flows upward, representing addiction to positive energy.
Blue and purple flames dancing in the wind without burning anything, illuminating faces with warmth rather than destruction.
A dark gray stone cracking open to reveal a bright yellow flower growing from the center of the fracture.
Human silhouettes with visible golden veins pulsing against a deep indigo background, radiating light outward.
A swirling galaxy of connected human hands merging into one single luminous sphere in the center of space.
Silent dust turning instantly into shimmering metallic flakes that float upwards, catching the light from below.

sections.name: Verse 1
sections.emotion: Growing physical sensation of the bassline
